task.title: Write planning compiler skill contract
task.summary: Define planning-mode instructions for turning validated documentation into atomic roadmap tasks and `planning_build` evidence.

goal.outcome: Planning mode becomes the explicit path for roadmap task shaping and `planning_build` handoff creation.
acceptance: `codewiki-planning` skill frontmatter triggers on validated documentation builds, roadmap alignment, task shaping, acceptance criteria, non-goals, and implementation handoffs.
Instructions state exact actions and tools: `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_task`, `codewiki_build kind=planning`, and artifact status when overlap risk exists.
Instructions enforce self-contained executable task boundaries, reject coordination-only tasks, reject tasks that only close other tasks, and define clear implementation handoff output.
non_goals: Do not implement code changes planned by the tasks.
Do not write feedback/documentation/implementation/validation loop content except route pointers.
verification: Run task-boundary or roadmap smoke coverage.
Inspect against roadmap and compiler specs.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Implemented TASK-095 planning compiler skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-planning skill, exact roadmap/task/planning-build/validation/implementation handoff guidance, and tests covering the new public skill surface.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck

evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for planning skill existence, frontmatter, `codewiki_task`, `codewiki_build kind="planning"`, boundary rejection, `source_documentation_build`, and manual roadmap edit prohibition.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-planning` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow the main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback, documentation, and planning compiler skills.
notes: Targeted asset/package tests were run before the broader smoke, pack, feature, and typecheck suite.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Created focused public planning compiler skill under `skills/codewiki-planning/`.
Added legacy planning loop asset under `skills/codewiki/loops/planning.md` for router compatibility and progressive disclosure.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new planning skill surface.
notes: No TypeScript source behavior changed; edits are skill/documentation/test contract changes.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for planning skill existence, frontmatter, `codewiki_task`, `codewiki_build kind="planning"`, boundary rejection, `source_documentation_build`, and manual roadmap edit prohibition.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-planning` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow the main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback, documentation, and planning compiler skills.
code_change_evidence: Created focused public planning compiler skill under `skills/codewiki-planning/`.
Added legacy planning loop asset under `skills/codewiki/loops/planning.md` for router compatibility and progressive disclosure.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new planning skill surface.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `codewiki-planning` skill frontmatter triggers on validated documentation builds, roadmap alignment, task shaping, acceptance criteria, non-goals, and implementation handoffs.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Created `skills/codewiki-planning/SKILL.md` with `name: codewiki-planning` and a description targeting validated `documentation_build`, executable roadmap work, roadmap alignment, `planning_build`, and implementation handoff evidence.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions state exact actions and tools: `codewiki_state`, `codewiki_task`, `codewiki_build kind=planning`, and artifact status when overlap risk exists.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `skills/codewiki-planning/SKILL.md`, `skills/codewiki-planning/references/tools.md`, and `skills/codewiki/loops/planning.md` define `codewiki_state`, direct source reads, `codewiki_artifact_status`, `codewiki_task`, `codewiki_build kind="planning"`, audit/validation, and session handoff usage.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions enforce self-contained executable task boundaries, reject coordination-only tasks, reject tasks that only close other tasks, and define clear implementation handoff output.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Planning skill and tool reference include task boundary checklist, forbid hand-edited roadmap/generated views, reject coordination-only/grouping/close-other-tasks work, and require planning build output with task ids, TDD/test strategy, candidate paths, and implementation handoff refs.

closure_brief.user_intent: Continue improving CodeWiki skills by creating focused compiler loop skills with precise tool/build/gateway guidance; implement the planning compiler skill contract next.
implemented_changes: Added dedicated `codewiki-planning` public skill with exact planning compiler workflow.
Added planning tool reference for task shaping, `planning_build`, validation, and implementation handoff.
Added legacy planning loop asset and updated main skill, README, and tests for the new skill surface.
acceptance_evidence: Planning skill frontmatter and workflow exist.
Planning skill requires `codewiki_task`, `codewiki_build kind="planning"`, boundary checks, and implementation handoff.
Tests and package smoke pass with the new public planning skill.
checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck
non_goals_preserved: Did not implement code changes planned by tasks.
Did not implement implementation/validation loop skills.
Did not change runtime compiler/source semantics.
remaining_risks: Generated CodeWiki graph/task view files changed because roadmap/build state was updated.
Implementation build lacks source_planning_build due accepted feedback-to-task shortcut used before the new planning skill exists.
TASK-093 and TASK-094 fresh validations remain pending.

risks: Implementation build does not cite a planning_build because TASK-095 implements the planning skill itself from accepted feedback before a prior planning handoff existed.
TASK-093 and TASK-094 remain pending fresh-context validation from staged handoffs.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-095 Write planning compiler skill contract implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-095 planning compiler skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-planning skill, exact roadmap/task/planning-build/validation/implementation handoff guidance, and tests covering the new public skill surface.

Checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck, skill markdown link check script, codewiki_audit profiles alignment,task,generated-parity for TASK-095
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
